title: HTTP Semantics, Roles, Representations, and Layered Evidence · Go Client Systems · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A security reviewer reconstructing an expired incident handoff must reconstruct the governing policy from partial evidence after delay and distinguish current rules from tempting earlier ones for http semantics, roles, representations, and layered evidence, producing protocol evidence map. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a Go 1.26 net/http protocol evidence map after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal deb…
objectives: Distinguish client, server, user agent, origin, intermediary, gateway, proxy, and cache roles per exchange. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Separate a resource from the selected representation and its metadata, content, and current validity. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Trace request construction, routing, transport, intermediary handling, response interpretation, and cleanup as distinct stages. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go Client Server Roles · changed case · Review Client Server Roles
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go security handoff client request G-5 crosses a resolver, TLS connection, gateway, cache, and origin before a changed payload is rejected. Separate every role, representation, state holder, and failure layer before editing code. Competency probe: Distinguish client, server, user agent, origin, intermediary, gateway, proxy, and cache roles per exchange. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

For Go Client Server Roles · changed case · Review Client Server Roles, keep Client Server Roles connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
